question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/TopicServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: findById(EntityId id)] Can an unprivileged user exploit the fact that TopicServiceImpl.findById() does not check whether the topic's timestampRange upper bound is null (open-ended, meaning current) versus set (meaning the topic has been superseded), causing it to return a superseded topic record with an outdated fee schedule?
